categories.name: I LOVE TRASH WITH OSCAR THE GROUCH

questions.clue:
[IMAGE CLUE]
(Oscar the Grouch presents the clue.) With lyrics like "I'm only happy when it rains, I'm only happy when it's complicated", this alternative rock band with Shirley Manson is a favorite among grouches

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Oscar the Grouch presents the clue.) You can even be grouchy under the sea; that's why my favorite characters in the 1989 animated film "The Little Mermaid" are obviously these two eels, both voiced by Paddi Edwards

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Oscar the Grouch presents the clue.) The FAA has a program to manage FOD, short for Foreign Object this, a French synonym for trash; like me, they take the topic of trash seriously [Oscar laughs]

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Oscar the Grouch presents the clue.) I long to sail aboard this type of ancient Chinese sailing vessel that has up to five sails that can be opened easily like Venetian blinds; its name comes to us from the Javanese language

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Oscar the Grouch presents the clue.) Sure, you can call it a sedan chair, a palanquin, but why would you when you can use this trashy 6-letter word for the enclosed couch that's mounted on poles & carried by porters?
